title: eupatorium catarium
intro: Eupatorium catarium, also known as the boneset or Eupatorium, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include reducing fever and relieving muscle and joint pain. The health benefits of Eupatorium catarium include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a natural remedy for conditions such as arthritis and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Eupatorium catarium is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and is also used in homeopathic medicine to treat various health issues.
